subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! His honour Mirza Abdul-Hussein is at times like unto the clouds of the mountain-heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله جناب آقا میرزا عبدالحسین گاهی ابره کوه و گاهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @poems and quotation from poetry, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
